examples: "Well, Donkey," said Chanticleer, "what do you see?"
Chanticleer replied, "All on our way a visit to pay to Mr Korbes, the fox, today."
He invited his pastor, Bishop Yvette Flunder, to sing as a guest soloist with Chanticleer on the album.
The Kittiwake is a Chanticleer-class submarine rescue ship that was part of the U.S. Navy's fleet until it was decommissioned in 1994.
